ModifyCdsAttribute.volumeId: ID of the disk to be modified
ModifyCdsAttribute.cdsName: New name of the disk; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1-65
ModifyCdsAttribute.desc: New description of the disk; desc and cdsName cannot both be empty; supports Chinese characters, letters, digits, period ".", space, underscore "_", hyphen "-", equals sign "=", comma ",", Chinese comma "，", colon ":", slash "/", and Chinese period "。"
ModifyCdsAttribute.deleteWithInstance: Whether to delete the disk with the instance; default is false; once explicitly set, the attribute of all related disks will be replaced with the new value; only supported for postpaid data disks; for V2 API, the cdsAttributeActive parameter must be set to true when releasing the instance for this to take effect
ModifyCdsAttribute.deleteAutoSnapshot: Whether to delete auto snapshots when the disk is deleted; default is false; once explicitly set, the attribute of all related disks will be replaced with the new value; supported for all disk types; for V2 API, the cdsAttributeActive parameter must be set to true when releasing the instance for this to take effect
